description: Character design — first wave. Subject IDs match this domain's lane id_patterns (portrait_, full_, expr_) so `sdlab generate` will route each candidate into the correct lane instead of default_lane.

defaults.negative: photorealistic, photograph, 3d render, smooth CG, sharp photo detail

subjects.prompt: oil painting, visible brushstrokes, [DESCRIBE YOUR HERO — head and shoulders, face detail, expression], painterly concept art, canvas grain
oil painting, visible brushstrokes, [DESCRIBE YOUR HERO — full figure standing pose, costume, silhouette], painterly concept art, canvas grain
oil painting, visible brushstrokes, [DESCRIBE YOUR HERO — emotion range sheet, consistent face across multiple expressions], painterly concept art, canvas grain
